offer: For insurance adjusters processing 5–15 claims/month, inefficient tracking causes delayed claim resolutions. We provide status tracking instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets and emails.
problem: Difficulty in tracking the status of multiple insurance claims.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance adjusters

try_it: Let users try claim status tracking dashboard and email notifications
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Collect 10 short interviews from target users
